target_meaning.0: will not subscribe to term deposit (no)

preprocessing_notes: Dropped 'duration' and 'campaign' (data leakage risk) and 'month'. Dropped rows where job/marital/education/default/housing/loan == 'unknown'. Mapped target: 'no' -> 0, 'yes' -> 1. One-hot encoded: job (11 categories), marital (3), education (3), default (2), housing (2), loan (2), contact (3), poutcome (4). Created boolean 'has_contacted' (True when pdays != 999), dropped 'pdays', then one-hot encoded 'has_contacted'. Applied StandardScaler fitted on training split (random_state=1, test_size=0.2, stratified).
